suppress.notes: CVE-2025-68120 is for the VS Code Go extension, not Go modules

go-control-plane is a phantom dependency — it does not appear in go.mod or go.sum. DependencyCheck incorrectly flags it via the broad CPE cpe:2.3:a:plane:plane. The CVEs attributed (e.g. CVE-2026-30242) belong to the Plane PM tool (makeplane/plane), not envoyproxy/go-control-plane. Double false positive: wrong dependency AND wrong CVE attribution.
